name: Biscocitos (Rio Grande Biscuit Cookie)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. In a separate bowl, cream the butter with 1 1/2 cups of sugar and anise seed until light and fluffy.
3. Beat the eggs until they are light and fluffy, then add them to the creamed mixture.
4. Gradually add the flour mixture and brandy to the creamed mixture, using only enough brandy to make a stiff dough. Mix until well combined.
5. Knead the dough slightly and roll out to 1/4-inch thickness.
6. Combine the cinnamon and remaining sugar in a small bowl.
7. Dust the pastry with the cinnamon-sugar mixture.
8. Cut into shapes using cookie cutters and place on a greased cookie sheet.
9. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 10 minutes, or until lightly browned.
From Aunt Bea's Mayberry Cookbook.
